# Test article

This is an article sample written in Markdown language in raw.

This should be compiled into JSX components and rendered into HTML to be read by human.

```js
const test = "code will be displayed like this";

function Foo(p1, p2 = 123) {
  const regExp = /^t(es)+*?(?<=[^0-9a-Z])t$/gm
  return 'Bar'; // comments
}

new Symbol();

[() => {
    test.reverse();
}]
```
